filter_logic: name-based INCLUDE gate AND NOT EXCLUDE gate at scrape time; barcode dedup + nutrition-sufficiency at BSIP1 curation. Identical two-stage pattern to run_cereals_002 / run_yogurt_003.

sweetened_dessert_routes_to_maadanim.rule: A white/cream cheese product whose name or ingredients indicate a sweetened DESSERT profile (added sugar leading, fruit layer במילוי פירות, chocolate שוקולד, vanilla dessert וניל ממותק, מעדן ... ממותק) is NOT in cheese-spreads scope — it routes to maadanim. Savory flavored cream cheese (herb עשבי תיבול, garlic שום, scallion בצל) STAYS in the cream-cheese pool (Stress Test Sec 2.3).
sweetened_dessert_routes_to_maadanim.detection: name dessert tokens (שוקולד / וניל / במילוי / פירות / ממותק as dessert) OR sugars_g dominance at BSIP1 curation; enforced again at BSIP1 NONCHEESE/DESSERT regex.

overlap_guard.vs_maadanim: EXCLUDE 'מילקי'/'פודינג'/'מוס'/dessert tokens + sweetened-dessert routing rule removes dairy-dessert crossover (maadanim scope). Plain/savory fresh cheese stays IN.
overlap_guard.vs_yogurt_system: EXCLUDE 'יוגורט'/'קפיר'/'משקה' removes yogurt and drinkable crossover (yogurt_system scope). Labaneh (strained cheese) stays IN — it is a cheese, not a yogurt.
overlap_guard.vs_brined_cheese: EXCLUDE 'בולגרית'/'פטה'/'צפתית'/'מלוחה' removes the brined sub-family (separate stress test).

min_corpus_rationale: Stress Test launch condition + cereals precedent: BSIP0 corpus must contain >=30 editorial-scope products traceable to a real Israeli retailer.
no_overlap_with_active_categories: PASS — filter rules disjoint from yogurt_system / maadanim / snack_bars / bread / cereals active filters.
